fit_validation.note: Same-link shell overlap is expected because generated meshes are cosmetic outer surfaces. Adjacent kinematic interfaces are reported separately from non-adjacent production clearance. Non-adjacent body clearance and joint sweep checks are hard gates for production fit. The primary MJCF keeps bodykit geoms visual-only; the collision-test MJCF enables contacts for MuJoCo inspection but uses unreduced cosmetic meshes, not final collision proxies. Production release still needs CAD boolean checks against final R1 CAD/scan.

panel_gap_validation.note: This is sampled mesh-to-mesh evidence for nearby bodykit parts in the home pose. Face inserts use a seated-detail gate instead of the normal rigid panel seam gate, but they remain included in the mechanical stress clearance sweep. Production release still needs exact CAD gap checks after split lines, mounts, and inner shell offsets are surfaced.

feet_ankles.visual_focus: low armored shoe shells, black sole bands, ankle joint clearance

legs.visual_focus: slim thigh/shin armor, knee articulation reveals, calf taper

hips_torso_chest_back.visual_focus: tapered waist, armored chest contour, rear spine/hip fairings

arms.visual_focus: slim shoulder/upper-arm/forearm shells and elbow articulation gaps

neck_head_face.visual_focus: donor face alignment, hard-plastic head boundary, neck carrier fit

part_review.review_contract: Every generated bodykit part is assigned to a region for visual review, clearance review, panel-gap review, and manufacturing follow-up. The report is not a final aesthetic approval.

face_alignment_validation.reference_source: eliza_front_reference.png visible-face proportions, excluding hair and glasses

face_shell_depth_check.reason: Prevents stress-driven over-flattening of the donor-derived parametric face while 2D face proportions still pass.

face_production_surfacing.surface_method: fixed-yz-grid donor mesh sampling with closed x/y section lofts

face_alignment_validation.note: Face alignment uses the donor-derived parametric face shell plus separate eye/lip inserts. Hair and glasses in the concept references are reference-only and are not generated.
